name: Planet Labs PBC
description: Planet Labs PBC is a leading provider of global, daily satellite imagery and geospatial solutions. The company designs, builds, and operates the largest fleet of imaging satellites in history, capturing over 350 million square kilometers of Earth's landmass every day. Planet provides mission-critical data, advanced insights, and software solutions to over 1,000 customers, including the world's leading agriculture, forestry, intelligence, education, and government organizations, enabling users to derive unique value from satellite imagery to solve complex problems and monitor global change.
